name: Saucy Mini-Loaves
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 oz Cream Of Mushroom Soup; 1 can
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the ground beef, cracker crumbs, 1.2 cups of the soup, 1/4 cup of milk, egg, onion, and seasonings until well combined.
3. Spoon the mixture into 12 ungreased muffin cups.
4. Bake for about 30 to 35 minutes.
5. In a small saucepan, heat the remaining soup, cucumber, and 3 tablespoons of milk over medium heat, stirring frequently, until boiling.
6. Reduce the heat and stir in the tomato and sour cream. Continue heating until just boiling, stirring constantly.
7. Remove from the heat and spoon the sauce over the mini-loaves.
